text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
La la laaa! ♪ I've wanted to see this movie for
ages now!

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
It's supposed to be a super hard-to-crack mystery
with an ending you'll never see coming... I wonder
what's going to happen!

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text: Looks like they're seating now. Let's head in.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(I wonder who the culprit will be! ☆ From the
trailers, I think it might be the chef...)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(But it's got an "ending you'll never see coming,"
right? So maybe I'm wrong. I'm so excited!)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, c'mon! Why'd it actually have to be the chef?!

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
No way. I didn't see that coming at all! Using a
cake to commit a crime? Talk about crazy!

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Totally! And that cake looked so good too. Why
don't we go get some while we're out?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm gonna head home. I'm flying way too low...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Isn't there anything out there that can get my engines going?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her heart down in her stomach, Mayano Top
Gun heads home...
